title: Punk Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Missing modifier in initialize() function allowing delegateCall() to replace forgeAddress with malicious contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses delegateCall() to modify contract state variables like forgeAddress

red_flags: delegateCall() to modify critical state variables
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that uses delegateCall() to modify forgeAddress in initialize()
summary: Punk Protocol was hacked due to a missing modifier in the initialize() function, allowing a delegateCall() to replace the forgeAddress with a malicious contract. A whitehat managed to intercept some funds but not all, leading to a partial recovery.
